title: Ender Relay
description: Adds a block that lets you teleport all throughout the end dimension
body:
## **About**

This mod adds the "Ender Relay" block, allowing you to craft it for teleportation to any lodestone in the End. The block is fueled by End Crystals. To use it, simply right-click on the Ender Relay while holding an End Crystal in your hand. This will charge the Ender Relay. Then, another right-click will teleport the player to the linked lodestone's position.

This mod can be used in Survival Mode, for Adventure Maps and/or on Multiplayer Servers.

## **Supported Versions**

-   Fabric: 1.20.1 ([Requires Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api))
-   Forge: 1.20.4 - 1.19.2

## **Crafting Recipe**

The block is crafted from 4 obsidian, 4 popped chorus fruit and one [Lodestone Compass](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Lodestone#Lodestone_Compass) in the middle(as seen below), this recipe will output a **single** Ender Relay

![ender relay recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1003537/description_7bfa0fb2-6ec3-4d46-a297-1ea4519cb119.png)

## **Additional Notes**

-   The ender relay can hold one end crystal at a time
-   You can hook up an hopper to refill it automatically
-   You can use a dispenser to charge an ender relay
-   The block emitts a redstone output of 15 with a comparator and has a light level of 12 when charged
-   The ender relay won't work unless crafted or spawned by a command with a lodestone postion

To get a working ender relay using commands simply use one of these two commands:

-   To get it as an item: **/give @s ender_relay:ender_relay{LodestonePos:{X:**_Lodestone X_**, Y:**_Lodestone Y_**, Z:**_Lodestone Z_**}}**
-   To spawn the block in a specfic location: **/setblock** _X Y Z_ **ender_relay:ender_relay{LodestonePos:{X:**_Lodestone X_**, Y:**_Lodestone Y_**, Z:**_Lodestone Z_**}}**

#### **For even more details, check out the video below! It dives into some additional features not covered in the notes**

## **Additional Credits**
Original concept and textures by [Kenadian](https://www.youtube.com/@Kenadian), edited by me.
